---
title: "mixed_model_test"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
data<-read.csv("E:\\Masters\\met_dat\\Master_20250925\\202509_daily_cloud_new.csv")
response <- "mean_cf_2_6"

covariates <- c(
  "median_PBLH",
  
  "PA_1_2_1_daytime_mean",      "TA_1_2_1_daytime_mean",      "LE_f_daytime_sum",           "H_f_daytime_sum", "mean_LCL_4_7", "LTS_K", "LapseRate_850_500_CperKm",   "PW_mm",  "RH_1_7_1_daytime_mean", "SW_IN_daytime_sum", 'evening_cbh', "G_2_1_1_daytime_sum" )
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(mgcv)     # for GAMs
library(glmmTMB)  # optional alternative for Beta GLMM
```

```{r}
library(mgcv)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)

covariates <- c(
  "median_PBLH",
  "PA_1_2_1_daytime_mean", "TA_1_2_1_daytime_mean",
  "LE_f_daytime_sum", "H_f_daytime_sum",
  "mean_LCL_4_7", "LTS_K", "LapseRate_850_500_CperKm",
  "PW_mm", "RH_1_7_1_daytime_mean",
  "SW_IN_daytime_sum", "evening_cbh", "TS_PI_F_1_1_1_daytime_mean", "G_2_1_1_daytime_sum"
)

df <- data  # replace

eps <- 0.001

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    month = month(date),   # assumes you have a date column
    cloud_beta = pmin(pmax(mean_cf_2_6, eps), 1 - eps)
  ) %>%
  # 1. Keep only April–October
  filter(month %in% 4:10) %>%
  # 2. Remove clear-sky days using your condition variable
  filter(Conditions != 0) %>%
  drop_na(all_of(c("cloud_beta", covariates, "month")))
```

```{r}
covariates <- c(
  "median_PBLH",
  "PA_1_2_1_daytime_mean", "TA_1_2_1_daytime_mean",
  "LE_f_daytime_sum", "H_f_daytime_sum",
  "mean_LCL_4_7", "LTS_K", "LapseRate_850_500_CperKm",
  "PW_mm", "RH_1_7_1_daytime_mean",
  "SW_IN_daytime_sum", "evening_cbh", "TS_PI_F_1_1_1_daytime_mean", "G_2_1_1_daytime_sum"
)

df <- data  # replace

eps <- 0.001

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    month = month(date),   # assumes you have a date column
    cloud_beta = pmin(pmax(mean_cf_2_6, eps), 1 - eps)
  ) %>%
  # 1. Keep only April–October
  filter(month %in% 4:10) %>%
  
    # --- 2. Keep ONLY boundary layer cloud days ---
  filter(blc_flag %in% c(1, 2)) %>%
  drop_na(all_of(c("cloud_beta", covariates, "month")))
```

```{r}
smooth_terms <- paste0("s(", covariates, ", k = 5)", collapse = " + ")

formula_beta <- as.formula(
  paste(
    "cloud_beta ~",
    smooth_terms,
    "+ s(month, bs = 're')"   # random effect
  )
)
```

```{r}
formula_mixed <- cloud_beta ~
  
  # --- Smooth (nonlinear) ---
  s(median_PBLH, k = 12) +
  s(LE_f_daytime_sum, k = 8) +
  s(SW_IN_daytime_sum, k = 8) +
  s(evening_cbh, k = 8) +
  s(LapseRate_850_500_CperKm, k=8) +
  PW_mm +
  s( RH_1_7_1_daytime_mean, k=8) +
  s(G_2_1_1_daytime_sum, k=8) +
  # --- Linear (parametric) ---
  #s(TS_PI_F_1_1_1_daytime_mean, k=8) +
  s(TA_1_2_1_daytime_mean, k=8) +
  PA_1_2_1_daytime_mean +
  H_f_daytime_sum +
  mean_LCL_4_7 +
  LTS_K +
  SWC_3_1_1_daytime_mean+ 
  Conditions
  
  
  # --- Random effect ---
  s(month, bs = "re")
```

```{r}
mod_intensity <- gam(
  formula_mixed,
  data = df,
  family = betar(link = "logit"),
  method = "REML"
)
summary(mod_intensity)
gam.check(mod_intensity)
plot(mod_intensity, pages = 4)
concurvity(mod_intensity)
```

```{r}
mod_intensity <- gam(
  formula_mixed,
  data = df,
  family = betar(link = "logit"),
  method = "REML"
)
summary(mod_intensity)
gam.check(mod_intensity)
plot(mod_intensity, pages = 4)
concurvity(mod_intensity)
```

Now look at drought behaviour

```{r}
df$drought <- ifelse(df$date >= as.Date("2025-08-01") &
                     df$date <= as.Date("2025-09-25"), 1, 0)
df$drought <- as.factor(df$drought)
```

```{r}
formula_drought <- cloud_beta ~

  # --- Smooths with drought interaction ---
  s(median_PBLH, by = drought, k = 12) +
  s(LE_f_daytime_sum, by = drought, k = 8) +
  s(SW_IN_daytime_sum, by = drought, k = 8) +
  s(evening_cbh, by = drought, k = 8) +
  s(LapseRate_850_500_CperKm, by = drought, k=8) +
  s(RH_1_7_1_daytime_mean, by = drought, k=8) +
  s(G_2_1_1_daytime_sum, by = drought, k=8) +

  # --- Linear terms (can also interact if needed) ---
  PW_mm + 
  PA_1_2_1_daytime_mean +
  H_f_daytime_sum +
  mean_LCL_4_7 +
  LTS_K +
  SWC_3_1_1_daytime_mean +

  # --- Drought main effect ---
  drought +

  # --- Random effect ---
  s(month, bs = "re")
```

```{r}
mod_drought <- gam(
  formula_drought,
  data = df,
  family = betar(link = "logit"),
  method = "REML"
)
summary(mod_drought)
gam.check(mod_drought)
plot(mod_drought, pages = 8)
concurvity(mod_drought)
```

```{r}
plot(mod_drought, pages = 8)
```

```{r}
mod_base <- gam(formula_mixed, data=df, family=betar, method="REML")

AIC(mod_base, mod_drought)
anova(mod_base, mod_drought, test="Chisq")
```

```{r}
concurvity(mod_drought)
```

```{r}

```
